emails.subject: SoCal Storage
emails.body: SoCal Storage Hey Matt, How's it going? When you get a chance, would you mind sending me the updated Net Inj/WD activity for SoCal for Thursday (10/25)? I also had a question on the injection for 10-18-01. When I was updating everything for last week's report, our ops report at the time showed a 366,000 injection, but now it's back to 101,000... Which is the correct number? Any idea why it does that? Thanks Matt! Sheila

emails.subject: RE: SoCal Storage
emails.body: RE: SoCal Storage Sheila, Socal injected 110,000 for thursday the 25th. Mat To: Smith, Matt

emails.subject: RE: SoCal Storage
emails.body: Thanks Mat! Don't worry about the other question I had--I found what I needed. Have a great weekend! s. To: Chang, Sheila
